LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND IS TO BE RENEWED AS A FULLY BRIEFED REGULARLY NOTICED MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE OF ARI HOLTZBLATT ADDRESSING ALL THE ISSUES THAT WERE ADDRESSED DURING TODAY'S HEARING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: KATY LEONARD, CSR#11599 415-312-9040, KLEO@DEPOREP.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)
